prompt: A dramatic sports poster featuring a waist-up portrait of a male cricket player in a royal blue Delhi Capitals jersey, facing slightly left in a strong three-quarter pose. His face is obscured by a large soft-edged vertical rectangular blur centered over the face, creating an anonymized reveal effect. Behind his head is a bright glowing white circular halo, centered like a spotlight or moon. The background is dark navy and black with electric blue flame-like textures rising on both sides, overlaid with rough chalk-style scribbles, arrows, circles, and large hand-drawn letters for a gritty urban sports aesthetic. The jersey has red-orange collar and placket accents, a white Puma logo on the right chest and sleeve, a Delhi Capitals crest on the left chest, a red circular Jio patch on the sleeve, a rectangular ALL SEASONS sponsor patch on the chest, and large Hero branding across the torso. Add realistic fabric texture, sweat sheen, grain, dust, scratches, and distressed poster wear. At the bottom, place elegant white handwritten script reading Welcome to Dilli above very large bold cracked white block letters reading {argument name="player name" default="REHAN AHMED"}. Use high contrast lighting, moody shadows, centered composition, and a premium IPL team announcement poster style.
translatedPrompt: 一张充满戏剧性的体育海报，展示了一位身穿皇家蓝 Delhi Capitals 球衣的男性板球运动员半身像，他微微向左侧身，呈现出强有力的四分之三侧面姿态。他的面部被一个居中的大尺寸柔边垂直矩形模糊效果遮盖，营造出一种匿名揭幕的神秘感。他头后方有一个明亮的白色圆形光环，如同聚光灯或月亮般居中。背景为深海军蓝与黑色，两侧升腾着电光蓝色的火焰状纹理，并叠加了粗犷的粉笔风格涂鸦、箭头、圆圈以及巨大的手绘字母，展现出一种硬核的城市运动美学。球衣领口和门襟处有红橙色点缀，右胸和袖口印有白色 Puma 标志，左胸饰有 Delhi Capitals 队徽，袖口有红色圆形 Jio 补丁，胸前有矩形 ALL SEASONS 赞助商补丁，躯干处印有醒目的 Hero 品牌标识。添加逼真的布料纹理、汗水光泽、颗粒感、灰尘、划痕以及海报的磨损效果。在底部，将优雅的白色手写体“Welcome to Dilli”置于巨大的粗体裂纹白色块状字母上方，字母内容为 {argument name="player name" default="REHAN AHMED"}。采用高对比度光影、深沉的阴影、居中构图以及高级的 IPL 球队官宣海报风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 震撼板球签约海报：一款充满质感、高对比度的板球官宣海报，适用于职业球队品牌风格的球员揭幕或欢迎图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, premium, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
